alpha.authorized_by: HUMAN authorization, 2026-07-07 session reply: 'Authorize Option A: add exactly 2 extra alpha launch slots' — a bounded budget top-up, NOT a change to the frozen preregistration, scoring criteria, repetition targets, or pass thresholds.

permitted_use.slot_1: the required rerun of the successful-but-uncollectible alpha rep (nonui-milestone-rep2) caused by the confirmed adapter-shim/harness evidence-loss defect (fix commit 5c32735)
permitted_use.slot_2: contingency ONLY for another independently evidenced harness-fault-class failure
never_for: an unfavorable but valid model verdict
a result that simply causes alpha to fail

alpha.beta_gamma_budgets: UNCHANGED; unused capacity is never reassigned

usage.harness_fault_rerun_for: the 5c32735 adapter-shim crash that destroyed the prior successful launch's evidence
usage.outcome: adapter_error — the deliver agent attempted to WRITE the verdict to docs/plans/ (blocked by the role's read-only permission mode) and emitted an unparseable markdown fallback; classified as model output-channel variance on a real framework gap (the inline decompose contract lacks the explicit 'return ONE JSON object as the final message' line the projected review/close prompts carry), NOT a harness fault — contingency slot 2 therefore NOT consumed
usage.fix_commit: 5c32735 (the harness fix that motivated this rerun)

alpha.rule: >2 adapter-level errors in one probe => probe INCONCLUSIVE => HALT and surface (frozen section 7.4; never silently extended)
alpha.recorded_by: operator, per the frozen abort rules — no criteria adjusted
